tasks.label: Git init and push
tasks.command: cd /Users/saeed/Desktop/wallpaper && git init && git add README.md && git commit -m "vibe code trying" && git branch -M main && git remote add origin https://github.com/javadominic/wallpaper-try.git && git push -u origin main

tasks.label: Read home_screen
tasks.command: export PATH="$PATH:$(brew --prefix)/Caskroom/flutter/*/flutter/bin" && cd /Users/saeed/Desktop/wallpaper && cat lib/screens/home/home_screen.dart | head -15

tasks.label: analyze
tasks.command: export PATH="$PATH:$(brew --prefix)/Caskroom/flutter/*/flutter/bin" && cd /Users/saeed/Desktop/wallpaper && flutter analyze 2>&1 | head -60

tasks.label: Flutter pub get
tasks.command: cd /Users/saeed/Desktop/wallpaper && rm -f pubspec.lock && flutter pub get
